title: crataegus punctata f. aurea
intro: Crataegus punctata f. aurea, also known as the golden hawthorn, is a variation of the hawthorn plant, specifically a cultivar of Crataegus punctata with golden foliage. The medicinal properties of Crataegus punctata f. aurea lie in its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular function, and acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate anxiety and insomnia. Crataegus punctata f. aurea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
